person.name: Richard Tootil Tuttle

memoryArtifacts.headline: Richard and Elizabeth Tuttle (Tootill) by Myrtle S. Hyde

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
https://www.wikitree.com/wiki/Toothill-1
Biography
Richard Tootill of Woodford, Northamptonshire, was born say 1530. He was the supervisor for the will of Richard Beare of Woodford on 3 Nov. 1579 and a witness to the will of Elizabeth Lyncoln in 1556. His will was made 1589 and proved 11 Mar 1590 at Peterborough and named seven children and his wife Elizabeth who was executrix along with their son Anthony. Their 7 children were: Symon, Anthony, Elizabeth, Ellen, Mary, Frances, and Thomas.[1][2]

Richard and Elizabeth were married about 1558. [3]

Sources
↑ Hale, House and Related Families- Donald Lines Jacobus, Connecticut Historical Society, Hartford, 1952, p. 771
↑ Cleaver, William Jessup, Ancestry of Allen Grinnell Cleaver and Martha Irene Jessup, Gateway Press, Baltimore, 1989
↑ Mildred Bradford, Moses S. Curtis Descendants and Ancestors, Baltimore, 2000, page 167.
England Select Births and Christenings
England Extracted Parish and Court Records

sourceList.title: Results of research for the family of Richard Tootill and Elizabeth

IF ACCURACY IS THE GOAL, let's use the professionally researched versions and stop making duplicates so the original FamilySearch versions do not get merged away with their important data. Please read his will in MEMORIES.

LET's READ & PRESERVE CREDIBLE RESEARCH for Richard Tothyll of Woodford, Northamptonshire, and wife Elizabeth unknown. He did not marry Elizabeth Lincoln; No relation, he only witnessed her will. Elizabeth Southcott is an old error not proven.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Tootil Tuttle於1530年6月13日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特時，他的父親Thomas de Totehyll24歲，母親Elizabeth Mason20歲。他於大約1560年與Elizabeth在英國諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年3月11日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Tootil Tuttle于1530年6月13日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特时，他的父亲Thomas de Totehyll24岁，母亲Elizabeth Mason20岁。他于大约1560年与Elizabeth在英国諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1589年3月11日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tuttle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly a variant of Thirkell, from the Middle English personal name T(h)irkill, T(h)urkill (Old Norse Thorkell, Thorkil, Thurkil, a shortened form of Thorketill from the god's name Thórr ‘Thor’ + ketill ‘kettle, cauldron’).

variants.name: Tuthill
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of Toothill, primarily a Yorkshire habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (Yorkshire) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancashire), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwickshire), and Tothill (Lincolnshire). There are several further minor placenames of this type that may have contributed to the surname. Also occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), which derives from the Old English personal name Totta (genitive Tottan) + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

nameMeanings.name: Tootil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Toothill
meanings: English: (i) locative name from various places named with Old English * tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (WR Yorks) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancs), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwicks), and Tothill (Lincs). There are several further minor place-names of this type that may have contributed to the surname. (ii) locative name, occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), recorded as Totehill in 1251.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Tootil Tuttle was born on 13 June 1530, in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas de Totehyll, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Mason, was 20. He married Elizabeth about 1560, in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 March 1589, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Tootil Tuttle est né le 13 juin 1530, à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Totehyll, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mason, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth environ 1560, à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1589, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Tootil Tuttle am 13. Juni 1530 in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Totehyll 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mason 20. Er hat um 1560 in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. März 1589 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Tootil Tuttle è nato il il 13 giugno 1530 nel Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Totehyll, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mason, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth circa 1560, nel Woodford, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1589, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Tootil Tuttleが1530年6月13日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas de Totehyllは24歳，母Elizabeth Masonは20歳であった。約1560年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1589年3月11日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Tootil Tuttle(이)가 1530년 6월 13일 영국 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Totehyll(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mason(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1560년 영국 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 3월 11일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.13 June 1530–11 March 1589: 13 de junho de 1530–11 de março de 1589
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Tootil Tuttle nasceu em 13 de junho de 1530, em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Totehyll, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mason, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth aproximadamente 1560, em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1589, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Tootil Tuttle родился 13 июня 1530 г. в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Totehyll было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mason, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth около 1560 г. в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 марта 1589 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.13 June 1530–11 March 1589: 13 de junio de 1530–11 de marzo de 1589
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Tootil Tuttle nació el 13 de junio de 1530, en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Totehyll, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mason, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth aproximadamente 1560, en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1589, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
